feed.title: AO3 - Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Perfect Enemy
entry.summary:
Author: SterekOTP3

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,834Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 2

Summary: The next generation of Hales find themselves caught in the middle of a battle against Spiky, a powerful aphrodisiac used to manipulate werewolves by forcing them into heat. Determined to break free from its control, the younger Hales must cast aside their compassion and the attachments holding them back, embracing a stronger, more independent identity as they unite against the forces seeking to dominate them rather than surrender to it.

entry.title: Like a Pinprick to My Heart
entry.summary:
Author: 13Salem

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 25,163Chapters: 8/12Kudos: 167

Summary: Derek was, for some reason, leaning over the bed Stiles was in and hovering directly over him. Stiles now realizes that the thing that tightened over his hand was definitely Derek’s hand. Holding his. “What day is it?” Derek asks, still hovering uncomfortably over him. Not even unnecessarily uncomfortable for Stiles, though it definitely was a bit strange, but it just seemed an uncomfortable position for Derek to maintain. “The 11th, I think,” he replies, though it’s honestly more of a guess. He’s not the best with keeping track of the date. Derek’s face immediately seems to completely shift into pure relief, and it actually unsettles Stiles because he doesn’t think he’s ever seen the man so unburdened. He collapses down on top of him, though thankfully catches himself at the last moment so he doesn’t squish the man below. Derek buries his face in Stiles’ neck and seems content to just… stay there. Was he sniffing him?

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,563Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 14

entry.title: Chaos Come Again
entry.summary:
Author: SierraStyx

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 104,416Chapters: 35/?Kudos: 1,167

Summary: Stiles has a good life. He has a great job, a great husband, and he's happy in Virginia. The pack is doing fine under Scott's leadership back in California. Aside from the grisly murder scenes he sees on cases, Stiles' life is actually pretty perfect. Which is of course, when everything goes wrong.Basically Stiles is part of the BAU team, and the Nogitsune returns. Mind games ensue. There are not nearly enough crossovers where Stiles is on the team, so idk here you go, brought to you by the voices in my head. Also in this fic Stiles and Derek didn't get together until Stiles was well into college, because I think canon-era Stiles/Derek is really creepy.

entry.title: Equal Hearts
entry.summary:
Author: WolfFeller

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,311Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 38

Summary: Stiles worries Derek's wolf sees him as something it owns rather than an equal partner. Derek gently explains that his wolf doesn't own him, it belongs *with* him, and their bond has always been one of mutual devotion and equality.

entry.title: Every Flavor of You
entry.summary:
Author: ProLuna

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 76,204Chapters: 35/45Kudos: 71

Summary: Derek Hale is a high school student who does his best to keep to himself. Until, he ends up as Stiles Stilinski's lab partner. Derek is an unmovable object, but Stiles is an unstoppable force, and their meeting has consequences across the multiverse. This story is a love letter to Sterek Fan Fiction. It imagines that every world from every Sterek fic is real and asks what would it be like if Stiles and Derek could travel to at least some of those worlds. This is a multiverse story. There is (temporary) major character death, and universes where minor characters have long been dead. There are a lot of stopovers into non-graphic portrayals of lots of different classic AUs. This includes a brief stop in an A/B/O AU where there is brief mpreg. There are lots of other AUs they will stop in, but I wanted to list those two things in particular in case they squick anyone out so badly that even non-graphic representations of them are too much. This story was originally my 2025 NaNoWriMo project, posted on my Tumblr. It is now complete and fully edited for AO3. The essence of the story hasn't changed, but I had to do a lot of pacing and characterization edits that weren't possible at the speed of NaNo.

entry.title: Where We Belong
entry.summary:
Author: PurpleSkits

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,389Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 1

Summary: Things have been calm in Beacon Hills recently. Too calm. Scott and the Pack get to actually focus on their schoolwork, but Scott is bored out of his mind.Then on a run to shake off his restless energy, he meets an Omega Werewolf, who turns his world upside down ---------- "Are you alone?" Scott asked, his eyes darting around. The boy nodded. "Yeah. The Alpha was killed not long after he bit me. I didn't realise there was anyone else like me for a long time." "How long have you been a Wolf?" "A few years now." ---"Hey!" Scott called. The blond stopped and turned his head. "In case we see each other again, my name's Scott." The boy smiled. "Isaac."

entry.title: Surrounded by darkness
entry.summary:
Author: Marlowe89

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,279Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 31

Summary: I would like to point out that English is not my native language.After the fight with Donovan, Stiles falls with him and loses his sight. Scott and the pack turn their backs on him, believing Theo's lies. Theo actually wants nothing more than to push them away so he can have the boy all to himself. Stiles is depressed and doesn't know what to do with his life. All his dreams have vanished, and now he must accept his new condition. Will anyone help him?

entry.title: All Around Me I Heard You Pass
entry.summary:
Author: sockpuppetstrings

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 90,101Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 69

Summary: Beyond the Boundary lies the Great Forest, where the gods of Beacon Hills reside. Derek—the dark mark on the Hale house—is the small time deity Stiles’ mother has chosen as her patron. But on the dreadful day of her death, the Nemeton is severed—a burgeoning god meant to join the Hale Pantheon. Someone local is to blame and Peter retaliates by descending on the village with a terrible decree: the town must sacrifice one of its own for the next eight years. It's a mysterious affair. Someone is simply chosen in spring and disappears at Year’s End, never to be heard from again. On the eighth year of this rite, Stiles and Lydia turn eighteen, which automatically makes them candidates for the sacrificial pool. The name that survives Peter’s holy fire will change the course of both their lives. *** I have watched you grow. I have seen you stumble and rise. I have been charmed by your humor, your inquisitive nature, the radiance of your soul. You are not just a shade to me. You are joy. Stubbornness and defiance and unwavering love spun you into being. And I see all of these things brimming inside you. Do not doubt that I love you.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Rust, Dust, and Your Eyes
entry.summary:
Author: Dino_Laurus_Rex

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 31,805Chapters: 24/75Kudos: 73

Summary: Seven years of unspoken words, hidden truths, and a bond forged in the shadows of Beacon Hills. ​Now, hidden away in a secluded bunker, Stiles Stilinski is completely on his own, carrying a secret pregnancy that connects him forever to the Hale lineage. As he looks back on the chaotic history that brought him here, he prepares for the hardest choice of his life—and the ultimate sacrifice made out of love. _______ Or just my version of the sterek ship throughout the series and After that until the Movie happened.

entry.title: The Extremely Unofficial Guide to Beacon Hills Boarding School
entry.summary:
Author: randomreader46

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 20,175Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 68

Summary: Winning a scholarship to Beacon Hills Preparatory is supposed to be Stiles Stilinski’s fresh start.Instead, he gets rich kids with trust funds, a campus that looks suspiciously like a murder mystery setting, a new best friend within approximately ten minutes, and Derek Hale — Beacon’s perpetually scowling lacrosse captain, who seems to dislike Stiles on sight.Honestly? Rude.______________________Tags will update as the fic progresses to prevent spoilers

entry.title: The Rival Alpha’s Mate
entry.summary:
Author: Kass_Writes

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,961Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 79

Summary: Stiles Stilinski is a part of the McCall Pack, not because he's a wolf- he's not, not because he's a spark, not even because he's knowledgeable, resourceful, loyal and reliable. He's only a part of the McCall Pack until Scott- his best friend or ex best friend in this situation- said he wasn't, he doesn't say it. Scott wants to use him. Scott was going to put Stiles up for auction and sell him to the highest bidder.Stiles refuses to be sold. Was Scott aware of what would become him if he were sold to any of the several packs wanting a taste of him? No, because Scott doesn't care.What Scott doesn't know is that Stiles has a past he's never spoken about, a past before Scott, a past not connected to the McCall pack. He was never really part of the McCall pack, he has always belonged to another.

  • Peter Hale & Stiles Stilinski Friendship
  • Pack Alpha Derek Hale
  • Derek Hale is Stiles Stilinski's Pack Alpha
  • Good Parent Sheriff Stilinski (Teen Wolf)
  • Sheriff Stilinski Knows About Werewolves (Teen Wolf)
  • Bad Friend Scott McCall (Teen Wolf)
  • Stiles Stilinski is a Little Shit
  • Mates Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski

entry.title: How to kill a cheating Werewolf in Three Easy Steps (And Other Lessons in Magic Parenting)
entry.summary:
Author: A_rnie

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,859Chapters: 4/4Kudos: 62

Summary: Derek walked in. He looked tired, his jawline still infuriatingly sharp, carved from the same mountain stone his ancestors had probably been hewn from. His eyes, those impossible emerald eyes that had haunted my dreams for years, looked hollow in a way I'd never seen before. There were shadows under them that spoke of sleepless nights, of a man who had been running on empty for far too long. But he wasn't alone. He was holding a baby. A baby. A baby who looked so much like him he could be a clone. "Derek," I said, my voice coming out strangled. "What the actual hell." I could feel everyone's eyes on me. Scott's were doing that thing where he was trying to convey "DO NOT KILL ME, I AM JUST THE MESSENGER" while also looking mildly constipated. Lydia had her "I'm analyzing every detail of this catastrophe" face on. Malia was, predictably, looking bored. And Derek— Derek was looking at me like I was the sun and the moon and all the stars, which was really inconvenient timing considering he was holding an affair baby.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski
  • Isaac Lahey/Scott McCall
  • Derek Hale and Scott McCall's Pack Members
  • Stiles Stilinski
  • Scott McCall (Teen Wolf)

  • Siren

  • Derek and Stiles love each other
  • Scott likes Isaac
